zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Dunbar於1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓時，她的父親James Dunbar of Moray22歲，母親Janet Seton22歲。她於大約1419年與Malcom Colquhoun在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Dunbar was born in 1390, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Dunbar of Moray, was 22 and her mother, Janet Seton, was 22. She married Malcom Colquhoun about 1419, in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1440, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Malcom Colquhoun environ 1419, à Luss, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.Luss, Loch Lomond, Argyll and Bute, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dunbar(이)가 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Dunbar of Moray(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Seton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스에서 Malcom Colquhoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Malcom Colquhoun aproximadamente 1419, em Luss, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Dunbar родилась в 1390 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Dunbar of Moray было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Seton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcom Colquhoun около 1419 г. в местности лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет.

Murió en 1440, en Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 50 años.
